item.title: When rejection feels overwhelming
item.description: For some people, rejection or criticism can trigger an intense emotional and physical response that feels far bigger than the moment itself. This explores why those feelings can be so overwhelming and difficult to shake.

media:content.media:title: When rejection feels overwhelming
media:content.media:description: For some people, rejection or criticism can trigger an intense emotional and physical response that feels far bigger than the moment itself. This explores why those feelings can be so overwhelming and difficult to shake.

item.title: Why ADHD Women Struggle at Home
item.description: A look at why some women with ADHD feel overwhelmed after getting home and how daily demands can build up.

media:content.media:title: Why ADHD Women Struggle at Home
media:content.media:description: A look at why some women with ADHD feel overwhelmed after getting home and how daily demands can build up.

item.title: How One Comment Can Affect Your Week
item.description: Sometimes a single comment can stick with you far longer than expected. This explores why certain remarks carry so much emotional weight and how they can influence your thoughts, mood, and confidence for days afterward.

media:content.media:title: How One Comment Can Affect Your Week
media:content.media:description: Sometimes a single comment can stick with you far longer than expected. This explores why certain remarks carry so much emotional weight and how they can influence your thoughts, mood, and confidence for days afterward.

item.title: What it’s like being a woman psychiatrist
item.description: A personal look at the unique experiences, challenges, and perspectives that can come with working as a woman in psychiatry and mental health care.

media:content.media:title: What it’s like being a woman psychiatrist
media:content.media:description: A personal look at the unique experiences, challenges, and perspectives that can come with working as a woman in psychiatry and mental health care.

item.title: ADHD Medication: Staying Informed
item.description: A look at ADHD medications, how they differ, and why it helps to stay up to date on what they do and where they may fall short.

media:content.media:title: ADHD Medication: Staying Informed
media:content.media:description: A look at ADHD medications, how they differ, and why it helps to stay up to date on what they do and where they may fall short.

item.title: She Can Run a Company, But Can't Open One Letter
item.description: A look at how ADHD can create surprising challenges with everyday tasks, even for highly capable and successful people. Sometimes the smallest tasks can feel harder than the biggest responsibilities.

media:content.media:title: She Can Run a Company, But Can't Open One Letter
media:content.media:description: A look at how ADHD can create surprising challenges with everyday tasks, even for highly capable and successful people. Sometimes the smallest tasks can feel harder than the biggest responsibilities.

item.title: 5 Hidden ADHD Signs to Know
item.description: ADHD doesn't always look the way people expect. Here are five commonly overlooked signs that can affect daily life, relationships, and productivity long before someone realizes ADHD may be part of the picture

media:content.media:title: 5 Hidden ADHD Signs to Know
media:content.media:description: ADHD doesn't always look the way people expect. Here are five commonly overlooked signs that can affect daily life, relationships, and productivity long before someone realizes ADHD may be part of the picture

item.title: How Suppressing Feelings Can Affect You
item.description: A look at how holding in emotions can build up over time and affect your well-being.

media:content.media:title: How Suppressing Feelings Can Affect You
media:content.media:description: A look at how holding in emotions can build up over time and affect your well-being.

item.title: Being Called Too Sensitive Can Hurt Self-Trust
item.description: A look at how being called “too sensitive” can affect self-trust and emotional confidence.

media:content.media:title: Being Called Too Sensitive Can Hurt Self-Trust
media:content.media:description: A look at how being called “too sensitive” can affect self-trust and emotional confidence.

item.title: Hormones, ADHD, and Perimenopause
item.description: A discussion of how hormones may relate to ADHD, including questions about perimenopause and ADHD.

media:content.media:title: Hormones, ADHD, and Perimenopause
media:content.media:description: A discussion of how hormones may relate to ADHD, including questions about perimenopause and ADHD.

item.title: How Medical School Changed My View of ADHD
item.description: A reflection on how medical training reshaped the understanding of ADHD, highlighting the difference between effort and executive function, and why “trying harder” is not always the solution.

media:content.media:title: How Medical School Changed My View of ADHD
media:content.media:description: A reflection on how medical training reshaped the understanding of ADHD, highlighting the difference between effort and executive function, and why “trying harder” is not always the solution.

item.title: Knowing Your Patterns for ADHD Productivity
item.description: How Recognizing Your Patterns Can Boost ADHD Productivity

media:content.media:title: Knowing Your Patterns for ADHD Productivity
media:content.media:description: How Recognizing Your Patterns Can Boost ADHD Productivity

item.title: My brain is offline
item.description: Ever feel like your brain just refuses to cooperate? A look at those moments when focus, motivation, and mental energy suddenly disappear, even when you want to get things done.

media:content.media:title: My brain is offline
media:content.media:description: Ever feel like your brain just refuses to cooperate? A look at those moments when focus, motivation, and mental energy suddenly disappear, even when you want to get things done.

item.title: You’re Not Overreacting, You’re Under-Regulated
item.description: A brief look at emotional regulation and why strong reactions can be a sign of being under-regulated.

media:content.media:title: You’re Not Overreacting, You’re Under-Regulated
media:content.media:description: A brief look at emotional regulation and why strong reactions can be a sign of being under-regulated.
